positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a forest gnome sitting on a smooth river stone. The gnome has a whimsical, joyful expression and is surrounded by lush, oversized fantastical mushrooms and delicate ivy. The style is detailed, clean-line vector art with a soft, earthy watercolor wash background. Use a limited palette of emerald green, sage, terracotta, and deep indigo. Composition should feature a strong central silhouette, optimized for apparel printing. The light is bright and diffused, emphasizing clean edges and high contrast between the subject and the background elements. The print should feel joyful and slightly psychedelic, evoking nature and whimsy.
negative: blur, artifact, watermark, text, logo, messy, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, photorealistic, grainy, solid background color, graffiti, complex machinery
